category_sources: Official Sourceware elfutils page describes elfutils as utilities and libraries for ELF, DWARF, symbols, and stack traces.
source_facts.description says it provides libraries and utilities for handling ELF objects.
display_name_sources: Official Sourceware project page title is ELFUTILS.
docs_sources: Official Sourceware elfutils page is the project homepage and documentation/index surface.
repo_sources: Official Sourceware elfutils page lists git clone git://sourceware.org/git/elfutils.git; normalized to the official source-control URL.
source_facts.repo is empty, so official repository was determined from official Sourceware project page.
tags_sources: Official Sourceware page lists libelf, libdw, and eu-* utilities for ELF/DWARF/debug data.
source_facts.description identifies ELF object libraries and utilities.
